definition: The structural floor for term premium is higher regardless of inflation-deflation resolution, because healthcare/pension spending increases create fiscal supply expansion at 10Y-30Y. A reflexive loop (positive correlation → reduced hedging value → higher premium → reinforces positive correlation) is self-reinforcing. Direction survives; any specific level does not (honest CI is 20-200bp).
evidence: Healthcare/pension spending increases regardless of inflation outcome — supply expansion is inflation-outcome-independent
DB pension closures accelerating — demand decay
Reflexive loop is self-reinforcing once initiated
Specific 60-100bp estimate refuted — honest CI is 20-200bp
Reserve currency status attenuates but does not eliminate
open_questions: What is the actual level within the 20-200bp range?
How much does reserve currency status attenuate?
How fast does the reflexive loop operate?
